factors.rationale: The product is the single dominant focal point and fills enough of the frame to identify instantly.
The accessory is shown in a realistic context, suggesting its use and functionality.
The image clearly communicates a specific benefit of military drop protection.
The layout is clear, with a readable text and no distracting elements.
The image showcases the texture and details of the product effectively.
The mention of military drop standards provides a credible trust signal.
Strong contrast and clear boundaries make the creative easily readable.
The image conveys a clear campaign intent with a specific benefit claim.
